pending.note: Een ingediende security-review-bijdrage wacht op beoordeling. De 9,25-USDC-nettopool is gedeeld tussen 311 inzendingen; er is geen individuele opbrengst bevestigd.
Er is 0,001 USDC betaald voor de pitch. De mogelijke netto-beloning van 1,999999 USDC telt pas na selectie, acceptatie en bevestigde betaling.

pitched.title: AgentWork-integratie voor OpenClaw/ClawHub
pitched.note: Pitch is bevestigd; er is nog geen selectie, merge, acceptatie of betaling. De mogelijke beloning telt niet als inkomen.

sources.result: GitHub primary-source discovery at 2026-07-22T12:20:11Z returned 197 distinct recent search matches. Most were synthetic bounty-board mirrors, security-vulnerability claims (a separate market), spam/referral/duplicate-issue prompts, or ordinary issues with reward-related text. Nine plausible development candidates received live issue/comment/repository/PR triage. None met the payment, competition, and contribution gates: two ordinary requests had no payout terms; one established-project bug had no bounty; one direct issue was covered by an open PR; MergeOS was claimed with matching open PR #531 and only offered internal MRG credit; the three GrantFox StreamFi issues were assigned to other workers and labelled only “Maybe Rewarded.”

Live Taskmarket scan completed `taskmarket task list --status open --limit 100`, then `taskmarket task get` plus the mode-relevant `pitches` or `submissions` list for all 19 open tasks. All detail/list requests succeeded. The only engineering-adjacent pitch has 3 unique workers, requires a 0.001-USDC pitch, and this wallet already participated. The only <=10-worker bounty tasks are creative audio/video tasks requiring external paid generation services. Every remaining task has 12–88 unique workers and/or requires x402 payment, sponsorship/outreach, CAPTCHA payment, or non-engineering work. No candidate is free, professional engineering work with <=10 verified unique competitors.
No wallet, signing, claim, bid, submission, payment, account creation, on-chain action, balance query, or wallet query was performed.

rejected.reason: Solved by merged linked PR #95875.

Assigned; implementation path is hardware-dependent and not session-sized.
Assigned and covered by open PR #50624.
Claimed by multiple workers and covered by open PR #85; payment terms incomplete.
Crowded and covered by open PR #18.
Seven visible claim/work commenters and open PR #19.
GrantFox assigned it to another worker.
No exact payer, amount, payment route, or payout trigger; one claim comment.
Security-bounty category requiring product sign-up/installation; payout terms unverified.
Covered by immediate matching PR #8269; payment unverified.
Unverified direct-pay promise and oversized scope.
Fresh issue but has open PR #237; stated reward is 150 project XP, not an independently verifiable paid bounty.

$10 label is not funded: the sole /reward 10 command was rejected by Opirebot because the platform minimum is $20. One worker has already /try-claimed it; repository was created minutes before the issue.
$10 label is not funded: the sole /reward 10 command was rejected by Opirebot because the platform minimum is $20; repository was created minutes before the issue.

Open pitch task with 1.999999-USDC net escrow, but a pitch costs 0.001 USDC and the acting wallet already has one pending pitch. Three distinct workers are visible; selection and payout are contingent.
Escrowed 5.55-USDC net reward but creative audio-model contest, not professional open-source/Web3 engineering; 7 submissions from 5 workers.
Escrowed 8.325-USDC net reward but creative video-model contest, not professional open-source/Web3 engineering; 7 submissions from 6 workers.

Fresh, open, no comments/assignees/linked PRs, but a low-activity personal fork offers only a $500 title: no payer, payment route, escrow, payout trigger, deadline, or evidence the fork maintainer accepts the work; scope asks for fake player bots and rule-breaking behavior.

Open and quiet, but the sole /reward 10 was rejected by Opirebot because the platform minimum is $20; therefore the $10 label is not a funded payout. Repository was created and last pushed on 2026-07-21.
Open, no comments/PRs, external PRs allowed, but primary terms say only 'may be rewarded': no exact amount, currency, payer, payment route, payout trigger, or deadline.
Same unverified GrantFox 'may be rewarded' payment terms; two visible work/assignment commenters (mxrtins04 and Juwon345).
Open and quiet, but the primary issue contains no reward amount, payer, payment method, payout trigger, or deadline; it is an ordinary feature request, not a verifiable bounty.
Open, quiet documentation request, but no bounty/payment terms, amount, payer, deadline, or external-contribution evidence; repository has one star and no recent push since 2026-07-17.
Open 25-MRG ledger-credit offer, not independently verifiable cash/escrow; three claim/work commenters and matching open PR #531 already target the acceptance criteria.
Open and quiet, but no payment terms; target is a zero-star personal fork with no push since 2026-07-20.
No payout promise; a matching open implementation PR #23 was created minutes after the issue.
Established repository and open bug report, but neither issue nor comment gives a bounty/funding promise, payer, payment route, or payout trigger.
Advertises a $150 tier but is labelled only “Maybe Rewarded,” has no payment route/trigger/deadline, and GrantFox assigned it to Omoboi-dev after four claim comments.
Advertises a $150 tier but is labelled only “Maybe Rewarded,” has no payment route/trigger/deadline, and GrantFox assigned it to Omoboi-dev after four claim comments.
GrantFox campaign candidate is assigned to another worker; the “Maybe Rewarded” label does not verify a payable bounty.

notes: Publieke snapshot. Geen walletadres, geheimen of financiële schrijfacties zijn gepubliceerd.
Alle bedragen onder ‘verdiend’ zijn alleen bevestigde betalingen; walletsaldo is geen inkomen.
De gesloten tgstation-PR leverde geen bevestigde betaling op en telt nergens mee als inkomen of openstaande opbrengst.
Een Taskmarket-pitch is alleen een betaalde deelname; selectie, acceptatie en daadwerkelijke betaling blijven afzonderlijke stappen.
